core_mechanism: sequential conditional thresholding that partitions the outcome space into disjoint first-exit (stagewise) regions and, via the chain rule of conditional probability, factorizes a global tail/error probability into a multiplicative product of per-stage probabilities each calibrated conditional on survival of all preceding stages
brief_reason: The abstract calibrates each stage's acceptance region under the null conditional on acceptance at all preceding stages, yielding a multiplicative decomposition of the total Type I error and disjoint stagewise rejection regions that give an ordered first-rejection decomposition.
